channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IRCTC shifts station kitchens to microwaves and induction; PM Modi offers support to Indians stranded in Gulf
item.description: Indian Railways, via the Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC), has instructed station food outlets, including food plazas, refreshment rooms, and Jan Aahar canteens, to switch to al...

item.title: UK player wins £181 million in EuroMillions jackpot
item.description: A UK lottery player has won an astounding £181,073,415.70 in Tuesday's EuroMillions draw, making it the third-largest National Lottery prize in UK history. The lucky winner correctly selected all five...

item.title: Shibiri’s calls with Matlala contradict his statements to parliamentary committee
item.description: Evidence presented to the parliamentary ad hoc committee investigating corruption in the criminal justice system shows that Maj-Gen Richard Shibiri, suspended head of the SAPS organised crime division...

item.title: Rostam Azizi Acquires NMG, Pledges Support for Independent African Journalism
item.description: Tanzanian businessman Rostam Abdulrasul Azizi has acquired a controlling stake in Nation Media Group (NMG), taking over more than half of the company from the Aga Khan Fund for Economic Development. T...

item.title: Expert Guide to Buying a TV in Spring 2026: Timing, Features, and Brand Recommendations
item.description: Spring, particularly around March to May, is highlighted as one of the best times to purchase a new TV, especially in 2026 due to upcoming new model releases and the FIFA World Cup boosting demand lat...

item.title: Comelec maintains regular workweek to prepare for multiple 2026 elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced that it will not implement a four-day workweek despite the recent government directive to conserve energy and reduce fuel consumption. Chairperson Georg...

item.title: Five Sindhi Labourers Injured in Pasni Grenade Explosion
item.description: In the coastal town of Pasni, Balochistan, five labourers from Sindh were injured late Tuesday night when unknown assailants on motorbikes hurled a grenade at a residential quarter in Ward No. 9. The ...

item.title: A Guide to the Rotational Dining Experience on Disney Adventure
item.description: The Disney Cruise Line (DCL) has been offering rotational dining on its ships since 1998, allowing guests to enjoy different themed restaurants each night while keeping the same serving staff. This di...

item.title: Iran Denies Reports of Quds Force Commander Qaani’s Disappearance or Execution
item.description: There is currently a lot of confusion over the whereabouts of Iranian military commander Esmail Qaani. Rumours have been circulating, claiming that the 67-year-old general, who leads the elite Quds Fo...

item.title: Congress Criticises US Statement on Temporary Approval of Russian Oil Imports to India
item.description: The Congress party has strongly criticised the recent statement by the United States that it had 'temporarily permitted' India to import Russian oil. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt had d...

item.title: Zanzibar restricts alcohol sales in local areas during Ramadan, tourists exempt
item.description: The government of Zanzibar has officially banned the sale of alcohol in all local areas that don’t involve tourists during the holy month of Ramadan. Minister of State in the President’s Office, Idris...

item.title: UK MPs Question X over Offensive AI Posts about Hillsborough Disaster
item.description: X, Elon Musk's social media platform, faced intense scrutiny from UK MPs over offensive AI-generated content by its tool, Grok. The AI falsely blamed Liverpool fans for the 1989 Hillsborough disaster,...

item.title: Nationals choose Canavan as leader, setting up showdown with Joyce
item.description: The National Party has selected Matt Canavan as its new leader, signalling a shift towards a more hardline approach in response to the rising threat of One Nation. Once a close ally and staffer of for...

item.title: Bam Adebayo sets Miami Heat record with 83-point game
item.description: Bam Adebayo of the Miami Heat had an extraordinary performance, scoring 83 points in a 150-129 victory over the Washington Wizards. This marks the second-highest single-game point total in NBA history...

item.title: Study Shows Poorer Patients Receive Less Clear Communication from Doctors in Tunisia
item.description: A recent study conducted in Tunisia explored whether doctors treat patients differently based on socio-economic background. Researchers sent trained actors posing as patients to 130 general practition...

item.title: Defence Minister Meets Military Chiefs to Address Fresh Terrorist Attacks in North-East
item.description: Nigeria’s Minister of Defence, General Christopher Musa (retd.), don call all Service Chiefs for one urgent meeting after recent deadly attacks wey happen for North-East. The meeting dey happen for Mi...

item.title: Silverpit Crater Confirmed as 43-46 Million-Year-Old Asteroid Impact Site
item.description: Scientists from Heriot-Watt University have resolved a long-standing debate about the Silverpit Crater, a three-kilometer-wide structure located 700 meters beneath the southern North Sea, about 80 mil...

item.title: AI in radiology: current use as support tool rather than replacement for professionals
item.description: Since the 2010s, advances in artificial intelligence have sparked debates about its potential to automate professional jobs, including those of highly skilled workers such as radiologists. Medical ima...

item.title: Zoox to Offer Commercial Robotaxi Service on Uber in Las Vegas Pending Federal Approval
item.description: Amazon-owned autonomous vehicle company Zoox announced plans to integrate its driverless robotaxis with the Uber app in Las Vegas later this year. Currently, Zoox’s vehicles operate without steering w...

item.title: Suspended senior police official Francinah Vuma testifies before parliamentary committee investigating corruption
item.description: Former Deputy National Police Commissioner Francinah Vuma appeared before parliament’s ad hoc committee on Wednesday as part of an ongoing investigation into allegations of corruption within the crimi...
